{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Blackflame training cave
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Blackflame training cave]] is where [[Orthos]] was standing.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
